messages.content:
I notice you wrote "exut'" - did you mean to type "neut" (the Neutron OS CLI command)? 

If you're looking to run a neut command, I can help you with various operations like:
- Document management (generate, publish, check status)
- Sense pipeline operations (check inbox, ingest data, write notes)
- Repository exploration (list files, read content)

What would you like to do?
